projectDescription: A zero-config, lightweight utility-first CSS engine that auto-generates styles at runtime and provides seamless automatic light/dark mode switching via CSS custom properties.
keyFeatures: Zero-config setup — drop in a single script tag via CDN and utility classes work immediately
Automatic light/dark mode via CSS custom properties and prefers-color-scheme media query
Runtime CSS generation — scans DOM and generates only the CSS rules actually used
MutationObserver integration for dynamic content — new elements are styled automatically
Comprehensive design token system: spacing, color palettes, typography, borders, shadows, z-index, opacity
Semantic color tokens (primary, secondary, surface, heading, body, danger, etc.) that adapt to theme
ESM, IIFE, and minified CDN builds with TypeScript declaration files
Theme persistence via localStorage with manual toggleDark() API
Tailwind-compatible class naming convention for familiar developer experience
publicApiSurface: version — string constant with the current TSS version
refresh() — re-scans the DOM and flushes any pending CSS rules
toggleDark() — toggles between light and dark mode and persists preference to localStorage
parse(className) — parses a utility class name and returns { selector, rules } or null
parseClass(className) — low-level class parser (also exported for direct use)
buildThemeCSS() — generates the full theme CSS string with CSS custom properties
TSS global — IIFE global object exposing version, refresh, toggleDark, parse
dist/tss.js — IIFE build for CDN / script tag usage
dist/tss.esm.js — ES module build for bundler usage
